name: SLA-Breach-Count (SBC)
description: Measures the frequency of 'Performance-Failures' where 'Agentic-Output' or 'System-Latency' exceeds the defined 'Hard-Constraint-Thresholds'.
goalMapping: Enforces 'Operational-Integrity' and identifies 'Infrastructure-Bottlenecks' before they impact 'Investor-Sentiment'.
